name: Linzer Torte
recipeInstructions:
FOR THE LINZER DOUGH: Preheat oven to 350°F with rack in center. Mix all the dry ingredients in a bowl. Rub butter finely into the flour mixture by hand. Whisk lemon zest and vanilla with egg and yolk, then stir into dough with a fork—dough will be very soft. Butter a 12-inch tart pan with removable bottom. Spread dough evenly in the pan, thicker at the edge to form the side wall of the tart shell. Bake about 25 minutes until well risen and firm. Cool on a rack.
RASPBERRY FILLING: Spread preserves in the tart shell and arrange raspberries on top. Edge with almonds and dust lightly with confectioners' sugar.
CHEESE VARIATION: Do not bake the shell. Beat cream cheese until smooth, adding sugar and remaining ingredients gradually. Pour into unbaked Linzer shell. Bake about 30 minutes. Cool and finish with jam and raspberries, if desired, or leave plain.
